name: Copywriting
description: Generate conversion-focused copy: headlines, value propositions, CTAs, social proof elements, and objection handlers for a product or offer.

inputs.name: product
inputs.description: Product or service to write copy for

outputs.name: headlines
outputs.description: 5 headline variations: benefit-driven, curiosity, social proof, urgency, question

outputs.name: value_proposition
outputs.description: Core value proposition with headline, subheadline, and supporting points

outputs.name: social_proof
outputs.description: 3 social proof elements (testimonial templates, stat claims, authority signals)

outputs.name: email_subject_lines
outputs.description: 5 email subject lines for different campaign types

quality_checks.name: copy_specificity
quality_checks.description: Copy is specific to the product, not generic
